title: goniogyna leiocarpa
intro: Goniogyna leiocarpa, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is commonly known as the Australian cow grass or simply cow grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Goniogyna leiocarpa is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
